DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF VICTOR CHIMAS' MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $340, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Sep-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED dba GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is granted. No opposition filed. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge : Peter J. Busch, NOT REPORTED. =(301/PJB)

Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances stated by Plantiff & Defendant.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Victor Chimas' Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
